use_cases: Call-to-action buttons requiring high user engagement and visual interest
Premium UI elements needing distinctive hover interactions
Interactive components with physics-based motion and spring animations
Buttons with eclipse-style spotlight effect following cursor movement
ai_summary: EclipseButton is a highly interactive button component featuring a magnetic pull effect that attracts toward the cursor and a distinctive eclipse color inversion animation on hover. Built with motion/react, it uses spring physics and smooth transformations to create a spotlight effect that tracks mouse position, making it ideal for premium UI applications requiring engaging micro-interactions.
